introSection:
Pandaful Coaster is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located in Wakayama Adventure World in Shirahama, Nishimuro, Wakayama, Japan.

Built by Senyo Kogyo, the ride was originally called Mad Mouse. At some point between August 2003 and 27 March 2014, the ride was rethemed and renamed. As part of the retheme, the color scheme was changed from turquoise track and pink supports to black track and white supports.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a tight layout.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars hold a single rider. Previously, the vehicles were mouse-themed. Now, they resemble pandas.

fullText:
Pandaful Coaster is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located in Wakayama Adventure World in Shirahama, Nishimuro, Wakayama, Japan.

Built by Senyo Kogyo, the ride was originally called Mad Mouse. At some point between August 2003 and 27 March 2014, the ride was rethemed and renamed. As part of the retheme, the color scheme was changed from turquoise track and pink supports to black track and white supports.

The ride has a tight layout.

The cars hold a single rider. Previously, the vehicles were mouse-themed. Now, they resemble pandas.
